Wikipedia article title and primary topic of the article
Web search of Wikipedia Turing machine article confirmed: 'A Turing machine is a mathematical model of computation describing an abstract machine...'
Web search confirmed this is part of Wikipedia's standard sidebar navigation structure
Web search confirmed this is part of Wikipedia's standard sidebar browse navigation links
Web search confirmed this is part of Wikipedia's standard sidebar navigation for browsing
Web search confirmed 'Upload file' is a core part of Wikipedia's sidebar navigation system, part of standard MediaWiki-based wiki navigation

privileged_info_summary: The task requires navigating to the real Wikipedia article on Turing machines (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Turing_machine), which contains the required text 'Turing machine' and 'mathematical model of computation' throughout the article. The Wikipedia page displays standard sidebar navigation elements including 'Donate to Wikipedia', 'Current events', 'Random article', and 'Upload file' which should be hidden by the print stylesheet. The output PDF should be saved to /home/ga/Desktop/turing_print_audit.pdf. The verification checks that the PDF was created during the task window, contains the article's main text content, and critically does NOT contain the sidebar navigation elements (proving the print stylesheet was correctly applied).
